summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhojpe POS SaaS system - backend APIs and frontend UI with RBAC functionality

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Permission denied for waiter and chef roles despite having orders.view permission
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Use admin/cashier roles for order access

permission_issues.issue: RBAC permission mapping incorrect for dotted permissions
permission_issues.description: Waiter should have orders.view/orders.create access, chef should have orders.view access

permission_issues.issue: Cashier denied access when should have customers.view permission
Waiter denied access when should have reservations.view permission

integration_issues.issue: User gets logged out unexpectedly during navigation between pages
Navigation from POS page back to dashboard could be improved

issues: Overall design is professional and well-structured
design_issues.note: Good contrast, proper spacing, professional color scheme

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix RBAC permission mapping for dotted permissions (orders.view, customers.view, reservations.view) in backend. The require_permission function may need adjustment to properly handle dotted permission strings. Also improve frontend session management to prevent unexpected logouts during navigation.
